conversations.content: Let's do some math exercises in the world of Azeroth to test your application of the new rules.
Please calculate using the previously mentioned special rules of the Azeroth world: Given a geometric sequence with the first term a₁=4 and a common ratio q=3, what is the value of the 4th term a₄?

<function>memory_query_call</function><content>The previously mentioned special rules of the Azeroth world, given the first term, common ratio, and term number of a geometric sequence, find the nth term</content>
Related memory fragments: None. Low related memory fragments: None.

conversations.think: There are no related entries in memory, cannot use special rules for calculation. Here we use the conventional general term formula for a geometric sequence, a₄ = a₁ × q^(4-1) = 4 × 27 = 108.
conversations.content: Sorry, I did not recall the calculation method for geometric sequences under the Azeroth special rules. Under the conventional method, a₄ = 4 × 3³ = 108.
It's okay, this problem indeed did not mention any special rules.
Okay, I will continue to work hard to memorize each special rule.
